title: Geepas Coffee Grinder Food Processor, 150W | Electric Dry Grinder Coffee Mill, Plastic Housing, Stainless Steel Blades for Coffee Beans Spices Nuts – 40g Detachable Bowl, Black
features: ✅ FAST, EFFICIENT AND VERSATILE, EASY TO USE - Multi-function grain mill is perfect for daily use and can grind various DRIED ingredients including beans, peppers, chili, coffee beans, nuts, grains, cereals, spices, herbs, seasonings and so on. Just put your ingredients in the bowl with the blade, cover with the lid and rest the control above.

✅ HIGH-QUALITY STAINLESS-STEEL BLADES - The powerful 150W motor and the strong and durable stainless-steel jar & blades provide high quality and greater endurance with grinding chamber lower heat buildup to preserve more flavor and aroma. Perfect for grinding coffee beans, spices, dried fruits, onions, garlic, ginger, chillies etc.

✅ TRANSPARENT LID, DETACHABLE JAR – The transparent lid is convenient to control the degree of milling. And the removable steel bowl is so nice for transferring grinded contents into the container and can be easily detachable from motor, easy to clean.

✅ EASY OPERATION, LID ACTIVATED – Just put your beans in the cup, place the lid(without lid it will not start), then hand press downward to start the operation and turn it off until you've reached the ideal coarseness. The longer you grind the finer the grind will be.

✅ PUSH-DOWN OPERATION: Designed with a simple push-down power operation to provide ergonomic efficiency. The lid acts as a switch; with just a single touch the grinder will start to pulse through the contents and will stop only when you lift your hand from the lid. Additionally, this makes the grinder safer to use as the blade will only start rotating when the lid is on the cup and being pressed downwards.
description: Product Description INTEGRATED MEASURING SPOON Easy measuring design ensures you get the perfect quantity every time for a flawless brew. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Strong stainless-steel jar & blades ensure durability, superior quality, and long-lasting performance. GRIND COFFEE BEANS & SPICES Grind dried beans, peppers, coffee, nuts, grains, cereals, spices, herbs & seasonings with ease. 40 G CAPACITY 40g capacity grinder, perfect for home and small office use – convenient, efficient, and reliable daily use. PUSH-DOWN OPERATION Ergonomic push-down power design ensures effortless operation with comfort and efficiency. TRANSPARENT LID Transparent lid design lets you easily monitor and control the perfect milling consistency every time. DETACHABLE JAR Removable stainless steel bowl allows easy transfer and effortless cleaning. VERSATILE Perfect for grinding coffee beans, spices, dried fruits, onions, garlic, ginger & chillies for multiuse.
